user.title: WhereSun address
user.description: Enter the address of your house. It will be geocoded automatically.

house.title: House layout
house.description: Build your house with squares and rectangles. Drag to move, use corner handles to resize.

house_reconfigure.title: Edit house layout
house_reconfigure.description: Update the house layout used for the shadow rendering.

error.invalid_address: Address not found. Check the spelling and try again.
error.invalid_blocks: The house layout data is invalid.
error.no_blocks: Add at least one square or rectangle.
error.invalid_shape: Unable to build a valid house outline from the selected blocks.

init.title: WhereSun options
init.description: Adjust colors, update interval and SVG output path.

generate_svg.name: Generate SVG
generate_svg.description: Force regeneration of the WhereSun shadow SVG.
